series_metadata.series_description: This series documents policy and informational studies performed by DHP and/or Boards at the request of other governmental agencies, offices, or the public. This series may include, but is not limited to: studies and unique data collected or created as part of the studies.

series_metadata.series_title: Applications, All Professions: Documentation Without Application
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents application supporting documentation received by the Board without a previously submitted application for all practitioner & facility licenses, registrations, certifications, permits, or other authorization. This series may include, but is not limited to, certifications, correspondence and transcripts. COV 2.2-3705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; COV 54.1-108

This series documents the results of an individual's examination for licensure, certification, or registration. This series may include, but is not limited to: individual score reports and Jurisprudence exams.

This series documents the examination process for an individual to be issued a license, registration, or certification. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications for examination, approved candidate list, registration forms, score report rosters, and statistical summary reports.

series_metadata.series_title: Applications, Facility: Incomplete, Expired, Withdrawn and/or Denied
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents incomplete, expired, withdrawn, and/or denied facility application files pending licensure, permitting, registration, certification, or other authorization. This series may include, but is not limited to: application, licenses from other states, credentials from professional organizations, criminal background checks, passport photos, and resumes. 45CFR164.530(j)(1)(iii)

series_metadata.series_title: Applications, Practitioner – Exam Eligible Candidates for Licensure with Authorization to Practice
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents all initial applications for examination which satisfactorily completed all educational and experience requirements for licensure, certification, registration, or other authorization, and had been deemed eligible by the Board to sit for its examination. This series only applies to applications for examination where the candidate must be issued a resident or other temporary license to gain the experience required to be deemed eligible. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications; registration and verification of supervision; and exam approval letters.
This series documents license applications received without fees. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications, certifications, correspondence and transcripts.

This series documents completed applications for reinstatement of a license, registration, certification, permit, or other authorization that is not currently valid, and is pending a final decision of the Board. This series may include, but is not limited to: application and supporting documentation, including information on impairments and criminal convictions. COV 2.23705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; COV 54.1-108

series_metadata.series_title: Applications, Practitioner: Denied Licensure or Other Authorization
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents completed initial applications for licensure, registration, certification, permit, or other authorization that have been denied by the Board for any reason. This series may include, but is not limited to, application, correspondence, examination and endorsements.

series_metadata.series_title: Applications, Practitioner: Incomplete, Expired, and/or Withdrawn
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents incomplete, expired, and/or withdrawn applicant/trainee files pending approval for licensure. This series does not include applications received without fees or application files for exam-eligible candidates for licensure who have previously been issued a temporary authorization to practice. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications; registration and verification of supervision; coursework outline forms; official transcripts; monthly credential review results; and exam approval letters.

This series documents incomplete and/or expired applications for reinstatement for a previously issued, currently invalid license, registration, certification, permit, or other reinstatements pending completion by the applicant. This series may include, but is not limited to, application and supporting documentation, including information on impairments and criminal convictions. COV 2.2-3705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; COV 54.1-108

series_metadata.series_title: Board Budget Information Related to Fee Setting Process
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the determination of professional fees. This series may include but is not limited to: projected board revenues and expenditures; cost center expenditures; biennial revenue and expenditure fee analysis.

This series documents the complaint, investigation, inspection and adjudication of possible violations of laws and/or regulations for regulated facilities and applicants, as well as any disciplinary action taken against said facility. This series may include, but is not limited to: evidence, notice, and final decision of the Board. 45CFR164.530(j)(1)(iii)

retention_rules.trigger_desc: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the complaint, investigation, and adjudication of possible violations of laws and/or regulations for regulated practitioners and applicants, as well as any disciplinary action taken against said regulant. This series may include, but is not limited to: evidence; notices and orders; documentation of final case disposition and/or Board action taken; confidential consent agreements (CCAs); and documentation to update a doctor's profile when there is an action/claim. COV 2.2-3705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; COV 54.1-108

This series documents complaints that are closed by the enforcement division such as investigations of unlicensed activity or complaints closed at case intake. This series may include, but is not limited to: initial complaint, investigation worksheet, case intake interview documentation, report or memo of investigation, documentary evidence, closure letter, and correspondence.

This series documents the completion of actions required per a probation order. This series may include, but is not limited to: order and supporting documentation of compliance with the probation or terms of the order.

This series documents investigations of alleged violation of law or regulation for a licensee of any Board or allegations of unlicensed practice. This series may include, but is not limited to:working notes and working copies of the investigatory report used in the preparation of the final investigative report.

series_metadata.series_title: Drug Destruction Records: Board of Pharmacy
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents court-ordered drug destruction by the Department of Forensic Science or police departments. This series may include, but is not limited to: court orders for drug destruction. COV 19.2-386.23

series_metadata.series_title: Drug Theft and Loss Forms: Board of Pharmacy
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents theft or loss of controlled substances which must be reported by any registrant or licensee. This series may include, but is not limited to: report forms. COV 54.1 -3013; COV 54.1-3006.1

This series documents the application process for schools and companies wishing to provide a program of nursing, nurse aide, or medication aide education. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications, correspondence, curriculums, notices, and board approval related documents. 54.1-3013; 54.1-3006.1 to 3006.2

series_metadata.series_title: Education, Nursing Programs: Closed Nursing Programs
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the initial approval to operate and close nursing and nurse aide education programs, and medication aide training programs. This series may include, but is not limited to: approval and closure letters.

This series documents the discipline process for medication aide, nursing or nurse aide education programs. This series may include, but is not limited to: complaint, investigation notes and reports, and records related to the adjudication of possible violations.

This series documents the graduation records of students from closed education programs for nursing, nurse aide and medication aide. This series may include, but is not limited to: transcripts, certificates of completion and lists of graduates.

series_metadata.series_title: Education, Nursing Programs: Program Compliance Reviews
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the review of currently approved education programs for nursing, nurse aide or medication aide for compliance with regulations. This series may include, but is not limited to: survey report, faculty information, clinical agency forms, visit summary, documentation of any issues with curriculum and documentation of any other deficiencies.

series_metadata.series_title: Health Practitioners Monitoring Program: Client Case Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents monitoring services provided to healthcare practitioners who may be impaired by a physical or mental health disorder, or who may suffer from a substance abuse disorder. This series may include, but is not limited to: Monitoring Program Committee (MPC) decision and action correspondence; reports; contracts; compliance status reports or notices; substance toxicology screening records and results; client-released treatment provider records; worksite monitoring records; case progress notes; and phone logs. COV 2.2-3705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; 42CFR Part 2; COV 54.1-2517

series_metadata.series_title: Health Practitioners Monitoring Program: Monitoring Program Committee Meeting Proceedings This series contains privileged and confidential
series_metadata.series_description: documents of the proceedings of the Health Practitioners' Monitoring Program Committee (MPC). Includes confidential materials used to make or support decisions of those individuals who have been participants in the program. This series may include but is not limited to: MPC case report packets, case worksheets, and documents of committee decisions and actions. COV 2.23705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; 42CFR Part 2; COV 54.1-2517

series_metadata.series_title: Licensure, Facility: License, Registration, Certification, Permit, or Other Authorization
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the activities associated with the licensing, registration, certification, permitting or other authorization of a regulated facility. This series may include, but is not limited to: documentation of changes to facility, architectural layouts, theft or loss of drug reports, audit reports, and innovative programs documentation. COV 54.1-3404; 21 USC 827(b)(3); COV 2.2-3705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; COV 54.1108

retention_rules.trigger_desc: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_title: Licensure, Long-Term Care Administrators: Change of Administrator Notifications
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the notification received by the Board of a change in the current, licensed supervising administrator or acting administrator in a nursing home or assisted living facility. This series may include, but is not limited to, correspondence.

series_metadata.series_title: Licensure, Practitioner: License, Registration, Certification, Permit, or Other Authorization
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the activities associated with Boardissued licenses, registrations, certifications, permits, or other authorizations of individual practitioners. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications, transcripts, licensure and/or disciplinary verification information from other states, address and name change requests and documentation, and licensure compact declaration of primary state of residence (PSOR). COV 2.2-3705.3; COV 54.1-2400.2; COV 54.1-108

series_metadata.series_title: Licensure, Practitioner: Practitioner Profiles with No Actions/Claims Boards of Medicine & Dentistry
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents actions taken to update physician and oral and maxillofacial surgeon profiles into the Virginia Health Provider system when there are no actions or claims against the doctor. This series may include, but is not limited to: physician or surgeon profile questionnaires, supplemental forms, and Emergency Contact Information (ECI) forms.
This series documents audits of licensees as required by Board regulations. This series may include, but is not limited to: audit letters, proof of continuing education, and late renewal.
This series documents information required to renew licenses. This series may include, but is not limited to: license renewal forms.

This series documents the process for an entity to request and receive an advisory opinion from the Board of Heath Professions as to whether the entity appears to comply with the Practitioner Self-Referral Act. This series may include, but is not limited to, applications and advisory opinions. COV 54.1-2400.2; 18VAC75-20-7.F

series_metadata.series_title: Prescription Monitoring Program: Requests for Waiver/Exemption from Reporting
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the process for prescribers, pharmacists, veterinarians, and other authorized users to request a waiver or exemption from reporting to the Prescription Monitoring Program. This series includes, but is not limited to, Requests for Waiver or Exemption from Reporting form & supporting documentation. COV 54.1-2400.2; COV 54.1-2523; 18VAC7620-60; COV 2.2-3705.5

This series documents the user registration process required for prescribers, pharmicists, and other authorized users to access to the Prescription Monitoring Program. This series includes, but is not limited to: registration form and supporting documentation.
